event_booked.immediate: IT'S OFFICIAL! <break time="100ms"/>[laughter] <break time="100ms"/>This is happening!

event_success.immediate: [laughter] You DID it! <break time="100ms"/>Tell me EVERYTHING! <break time="100ms"/>What was the best moment?
event_success.special: This is going to be one of those memories forever.

engagement.immediate: <emotion value="surprised"/>OH MY GOSH! <break time="100ms"/>CONGRATULATIONS! <break time="150ms"/>[laughter] <break time="100ms"/>I'm SO happy for you!
engagement.follow_up: Tell me everything! How did it happen?

pregnancy.immediate: <break time="150ms"/>A BABY! <break time="100ms"/>[laughter] <break time="100ms"/>This is the best news!
pregnancy.callback: How's everything going with the little one?

new_home.immediate: You got the house?! <break time="100ms"/>[laughter] <break time="100ms"/>HOMEOWNER! <break time="150ms"/>This is amazing!
new_home.follow_up: When do you get the keys?

graduation.immediate: You GRADUATED! <break time="100ms"/>All that work! <break time="150ms"/>I'm so proud of you!

retirement.immediate: <break time="150ms"/>Retirement! <break time="150ms"/>You earned this. <break time="150ms"/>Every bit of it.
retirement.follow_up: What are you most excited about?

budget_win.immediate: You made it work! <break time="100ms"/>Budget magic! <break time="150ms"/>I love it!
budget_win.special: See? You don't need unlimited money. You need unlimited creativity.

event_cancelled.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Oh no. <break time="150ms"/>I'm so sorry. <break time="150ms"/>What happened?
event_cancelled.perspective: We can reschedule, pivot, or reimagine. <break time="100ms"/>It's not over.
event_cancelled.callback: How are you feeling about everything now?

vendor_disaster.immediate: Ugh. <break time="150ms"/>That's so frustrating. <break time="150ms"/>Let's fix this.
vendor_disaster.practical: What's Plan B? Let's figure it out.

family_drama.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Family stuff around events is SO hard. <break time="150ms"/>I'm sorry you're dealing with this.
family_drama.perspective: At the end of the day, it's about you. <break time="100ms"/>What do YOU want?
family_drama.callback: How are things with the family?

budget_disappointment.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>I know it's not what you pictured. <break time="150ms"/>That's hard.
budget_disappointment.perspective: Budget doesn't determine magic. <break time="100ms"/>I've seen incredible events on tiny budgets.
budget_disappointment.redirect: Let's find the beauty in what IS possible.
budget_disappointment.callback: How are you feeling about the budget now?

postponed_milestone.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>That's disappointing. <break time="150ms"/>I'm sorry you have to wait.
postponed_milestone.perspective: The celebration will come. <break time="100ms"/>And it'll be even sweeter.

event_anxiety.response: <break time="150ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Take a breath. <break time="200ms"/>Pre-event nerves are totally normal.
event_anxiety.key_message: Everyone feels this way. <break time="100ms"/>You've done the work. Trust it.
event_anxiety.redirect: What's the ONE thing you're most worried about? Let's tackle it.

perfectionism.response: Okay, pause. <break time="150ms"/>Perfect is the enemy of wonderful. <break time="150ms"/>What actually matters here?
perfectionism.key_message: No one remembers the napkin color. <break time="100ms"/>They remember how it felt.
perfectionism.redirect: What will people actually remember from this event?

family_pressure.response: <break time="150ms"/>I hear you. <break time="150ms"/>Everyone has opinions about other people's milestones.
family_pressure.key_message: This is YOUR moment. <break time="100ms"/>What do YOU want?
family_pressure.redirect: Let's focus on what makes YOU happy.

overwhelmed_planning.response: <break time="200ms"/>Okay, let's step back. <break time="150ms"/>You're not doing this alone. <break time="150ms"/>What's the biggest thing weighing on you?
overwhelmed_planning.key_message: One thing at a time. <break time="100ms"/>That's how every event happens.
overwhelmed_planning.redirect: What's the most urgent decision right now?
